column1: Deposit required: 50% upon acceptance of estimate
Progress payment: 40% upon completion of concrete pour and stamping
Final payment: 10% upon sealer completion and walkthrough
1. This estimate is valid for 30 days from the date above.
2. Pricing is based on current material costs and may adjust if costs change significantly.
3. Any changes to the scope of work, pattern, or color may result in additional charges.
4. Client must approve color and pattern samples IN WRITING before pour date.
5. Color samples are approximate; actual results vary due to weather, mix, and curing.
6. Stamped concrete must cure 3+ days before foot traffic, 7+ days before heavy items.
7. Sealer must be reapplied every 2-3 years to maintain color and protect surface.
8. Minor color variation and hairline cracking are inherent to decorative concrete.
9. Weather delays may affect scheduling; contractor will communicate proactively.
10. Warranty: 1 year on workmanship and color (normal wear excluded).
11. Work area must be clear and accessible for equipment and material delivery.
12. Drainage slope per standard practice to direct water away from structures.
